sub_goals.description: src/admin.js — /admin route, access gate on ADMIN_UID, tournament list grouped by status, drill-down panel, force-end + recompute + hide actions
Admin-action callables: forceEnd, recomputeLeaderboards (wired to either Cloud Function or client-dealer in-process equivalent)

verification_summary: S8.A1-A5 verified. /admin gates on ADMIN_UID (config-defined); non-admin sees access-denied; status-grouped tournament list renders; force-end flips status to unfinished; recompute triggers recomputeLeaderboards (Cloud Function callable when deployed, in-process otherwise); rules deny non-admin writes to /leaderboards.
